channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fire at girls' school in Kenya kills at least 16 students, injures scores more
item.description: A fire at a school for girls in central Kenya has caused an unknown number of deaths, according to police, who said search teams have been deployed.

item.title: Iran live updates: IRGC claims attack on US airbase after Bandar Abbas strikes
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Is AI to blame for hiring woes faced by college graduates?
item.description: Analysts disagree about whether AI is a factor in the hiring crunch.

item.title: 3M sued for $1.4 billion by Australia over "forever chemicals" at defense bases
item.description: Australia is suing 3M for more than 2 billion Australian dollars ($1.4 billion) over so-called "forever chemical" contamination from firefighting foam...
